name: regl-scatterplot
when_to_use: 几十万~百万点散点(embedding/t-SNE/UMAP、单细胞、聚类)要缩放/框选/lasso/连续着色地探索时用它;几百点用普通散点(Chart.js/Plotly)即可,别上 GPU。硬要求:坐标须预先归一化到 [-1,1](NDC),且需自备一个 <canvas>。
why_valuable: Canvas/SVG 在几万点以上必卡死;regl-scatterplot 用 regl(WebGL)GPU 实例化渲染百万点并保持交互拾取,AI 写不出 GPU 散点渲染管线与相机变换。

data_in.note: 关键:每个点坐标必须预先归一化到 [-1,1](NDC),库不替你缩放。点是数组不是对象:[x,y] 或 [x,y,category,value];category 为整数(索引调色板做分类着色),value∈[0,1](连续着色/透明度)。

schema.points: Array<[x, y] | [x, y, category, value]> —— x,y∈[-1,1];category:number(整数,分类索引);value:number(0..1,连续通道)
schema.pointSize?: number —— 点像素半径,传入 createScatterplot 选项;默认由本条 boot 设为 4

spec.note: 自备 <canvas> 填满容器;默认容器 height 400px,禁 vh。构造前 canvas 需有实际尺寸(getBoundingClientRect),尺寸变化后用 scatterplot.set({width,height}) 更新。

example._why: 钉死点是数组 [x,y,category,value] 且 x,y∈[-1,1](已归一化)。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;框选/lasso/点击选择若需外传,由消费 AI 接 scatterplot.subscribe('select'/'deselect') 等原生事件并按载体处理。

carriers.widget: conditional:canvas 落 shadow、WebGL 正常;但相机在 window 挂 mousemove/mouseup/keydown/keyup/resize/orientationchange 监听,且动画辅助向 document.head 注入 stylesheet(全局但无害)。
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + WebGL,peers regl/pub-sub-es 经嵌套 +esm 自解析。

isolation.evidence: 默认导出 createScatterplot(+esm: export{...,Zu as default};另有 named checkSupport/createRegl/createRenderer)。+esm 头部把 peers 外置为嵌套 import:import Sc from "/npm/regl@2.1.1/+esm"、import vc from "/npm/pub-sub-es@3.0.0/+esm"——运行时自解析,无需手动载 regl。API(README):createScatterplot({canvas,width,height,pointSize});scatterplot.draw(points),points=[[x,y],[x,y,category,value]];README 明写 points 须归一化到 [-1,1](NDC)。globalStyleInjection=yes:grep 命中 t.createElement("style");document.head.appendChild(e) 与 n.insertRule(...)——注入一张全局动画/过渡 stylesheet。globalEvents=yes:window.addEventListener 命中 blur/keydown/keyup/mousemove/mouseup/orientationchange/resize(dom-2d-camera 平移缩放 + 键盘修饰键 + 尺寸),另有 ResizeObserver。globalDomMutation=no:只画进你提供的 canvas。

en.when_to_use: Use it to explore scatterplots with hundreds of thousands to millions of points, such as embeddings, t-SNE/UMAP, single-cell data, or clusters, with zoom, box/lasso selection, and continuous coloring. For a few hundred points, use an ordinary Chart.js/Plotly scatterplot instead of GPU rendering. Hard requirement: coordinates must be normalized to [-1,1] (NDC) in advance, and you must provide a <canvas>.
en.why_valuable: Canvas/SVG becomes unusable above tens of thousands of points; regl-scatterplot uses regl (WebGL) to render millions of instanced points on the GPU while preserving interactive picking. AI cannot write the GPU scatter-rendering pipeline and camera transforms.

data_in.note: Important: every point coordinate must already be normalized to [-1,1] (NDC); the library does not scale it for you. Points are arrays, not objects: [x,y] or [x,y,category,value]. category is an integer palette index for categorical color, and value is in [0,1] for continuous color/opacity.

schema.points: Array<[x, y] | [x, y, category, value]> -- x,y in [-1,1]; category:number (integer category index); value:number (0..1 continuous channel)
schema.pointSize?: number -- Point radius in pixels, passed to createScatterplot options; this entry's boot default is 4

spec.note: Provide a <canvas> that fills the container; default container height is 400px and vh is forbidden. The canvas needs real dimensions from getBoundingClientRect before construction; after resize, update with scatterplot.set({width,height}).
